prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-MICKEYMOUSE-FIRE-FIGURE-HPNR
Product Type: TOY_FIGURE
Brand (from catalog): Disney
Existing Title: Disney Junior Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse Articulated 6-inch Figure and Accessories, Kids Toys for Ages 3 Up
Description: It’s Mickey Mouse to the rescue. The Disney Junior Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse figure is ready to save the day. Preschoolers will love playing first responder with this poseable Mickey Mouse action figure. Firefighter Mickey Mouse wears a red uniform and comes equipped with a portable water cannon attached to a backpack. Squeeze his legs — his torso rotates and his arms swing back and forth. Kids can pretend he’s spraying water to put out a fire. Press the button on the cannon to shoot a “water” ball. The Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse figure stands 6 inches tall and has 6 points of articulation to position him into lots of action poses for imaginative play. This Disney toy is perfect for little hands and big imaginations. Collect all the Disney Junior Mickey Mouse toy figures and playsets by Just Play. For kids ages 3 years and up.
Search Terms: (none)
Features:
- Includes: Mickey Mouse figure, backpack with water cannon, "water" ball.
- Mickey Mouse Rescue Adventure: The Disney Junior Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse figure is ready to tackle any rescue mission.
- Kid-Powered Action: Squeeze Mickey’s legs to rotate his torso and swing his arms back and forth. Kids can imagine that that Mickey is spraying water to put out the flames.
- Put Out Pretend Fires: Press the button on the water cannon to shoot the “water” ball.
- Poseable Mickey Mouse Figure: This 6-inch Mickey Mouse figure is ready for action! With 6 points of articulation, kids can move it into dynamic action poses for pretend firefighting adventures.

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse 6-inch Articulated Figure

tokens.name: Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse Articulated Figure

openai.item_name: Disney 6-inch Red Fire Rescue Mickey Mouse Figure

anthropic.title_differentiation: 6 Points Of Articulation, Water Cannon With Ball Shooter, Poseable Action Figure, Ages 3 And Up

openai.title_differentiation: Poseable 6 Inch Figure - 6 Points Of Articulation - Backpack Water Cannon - Shoots "Water" Ball - Ages 3 And Up
